checks.description: Verify ValueError raised when input_fp does not exist.
checks.test_code: import os; import tempfile; fp = 'nonexistent.fasta'; try: deblur_system_call([], fp); assert False; except ValueError: pass
checks.name: check_369332d138
checks.rule: Verify ValueError raised when input_fp does not exist.

checks.description: Verify ValueError raised when input_fp is not a valid FASTA (no '>' header).
checks.test_code: with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', suffix='.fasta', delete=False) as f: f.write('NOT_A_HEADER\nACTG\n'); fp = f.name; try: deblur_system_call([], fp); assert False; except ValueError: pass; os.unlink(fp)
checks.name: check_ddc3ef45a3
checks.rule: Verify ValueError raised when input_fp is not a valid FASTA (no '>' header).

checks.description: Verify TypeError raised when params is not a list.
checks.test_code: import os; import tempfile; fp = 'test_sequences.fasta'; with open(fp, 'w') as f: f.write('>h\nA\n'); try: deblur_system_call('not_a_list', fp); assert False; except TypeError: pass; os.unlink(fp)
checks.name: check_7584ececef
checks.rule: Verify TypeError raised when params is not a list.

checks.description: Verify TypeError raised when input_fp is not a string.
checks.test_code: try: deblur_system_call([], 123); assert False; except TypeError: pass
checks.name: check_0ae1b08358
checks.rule: Verify TypeError raised when input_fp is not a string.

checks.description: Verify command construction preserves special characters in params.
checks.test_code: import os; import tempfile; fp = 'test_sequences.fasta'; with open(fp, 'w') as f: f.write('>h\nA\n'); stdout, stderr, rc = deblur_system_call(['--arg-with-space', 'value with spaces'], fp); assert "'--arg-with-space', 'value with spaces'" in stdout; os.unlink(fp)
checks.name: check_299546514f
checks.rule: Verify command construction preserves special characters in params.
